title: DMart Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: DMart Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
DMart Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DMart Advisory Limited:
DMart Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart Advisory Limited!
